title: Expanded adventures lite
description: Explore a unique world with MAGIC, TECHNOLOGY, 500+ QUESTS AND MORE
body:
### [IT IS A LITE VERSION OF MODPACK. CHECK BASE VERSION BY CLICKING THIS](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/expanded-adventures-forge)
![update logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9b6c23bfe7d8daa549d15af74b833aa36c19c84f.png)
## Features
- 📖 **500+ quests - a lot of quests to help you play(ONLY IN BASE VERSION)**
- 🏡 **Colonies - Build your own village with MineColonies mod**
- 💧 Hydration - Now you need to drink
- 🍖 Cooking - A lot of new different food
- ❄️ Temperature - keep yourself cozy in all areas
- 🌍 Seasons - prepare for winter & check your crops
- ⚔️ Fight - mobs get stronger the further you go. At the same time they offer more loot
- ♟️ Bosses - a lot of new difficult bosses
- 🎒 Backpacks - store goods in drawers
- 🧰 Upgradable chests - more space for your stuff
- 🔨 Upgrade Tools - smith gems onto tools while also increase the rarity
- 🪑 Furniture & decor - decorate your house with a lot of new decorations
- 🦖 Archeology - reveal ancient fossils & powerful enchantments
- 📈 Multiplayer - play with friends
![rland](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d942c69577107670f6614b1f108fd3e1ecd45455_0.webp)
